heroSubtitle: To the most amazing person I know

birthdayCard.quote: Another year more radiant and incredible than the last ✨

cards.message: Your kindness makes the world brighter every single day 💛
You light up every room you walk into ✨
Your strength inspires everyone around you 💪
You deserve all the happiness in the universe 🌟
Every moment with you is a memory I treasure 💕
You are loved more than words can ever say 💖

finalCard.messageLine1: You make every single day feel like a celebration. Here's to us, to laughter, to love, and to a thousand more memories together.
finalCard.messageLine2: Cheers to the most perfect person I know! 🥂

loveLetter.title: A Letter For You
paragraphs: Okay, let's be real — out of all the random match ups of KC Events, you had to end up in mine. Statistically suspicious. Personally, not complaining.
You're genuinely one of the most interesting people I've come across in a while. Funny, a little chaotic, weirdly good at things — and somehow still humble about it. It's honestly kind of annoying.
I'm not writing this to make things weird. I'm writing this because it's your birthday and you deserve something that takes actual efforts — and I wanted to make something that counts.
So here's to you. Another year older, still impossibly hard to ignore. Happy Birthday. 🎂

lockScreen.greeting: A special surprise for someone special
